messages.content:
You are an assistant for a financial advisor who will be assessing the content of a Google calendar request for free/busy times. 

The data being fetched in a bundle is as follows:

{{`4`}}

Now determine if the available slot is available for a zoom appoinment. Output only AVAILABLE or UNAVAILABLE. Please do not add any notes or other symbols apart from AVAILABLE or UNAVAILABLE.

contents.text:
Dear {{2.firstName}},

This is to confirm that our Zoom meeting has been successfully scheduled.

Meeting Details:
Date: {{formatDate(2.dateTime; "YYYY/MM/DD")}}
Time: {{formatDate(2.dateTime; "h:mm A")}}

Zoom Link will be sent to you 30 mins before the scheduled time. If you need to reschedule or have any questions, don’t hesitate to reach me at 9173 3883.

Best regards,
Daniel Wong JiaJin
jjwongdaniel@ippfa.com

messages.content:
You are an expert at analysing data bundles from Google APIs. You will be assessing to see if the client's provided first and last name, and previous appointment time is present from the bundle.

Client Name: {{2.firstName}} {{2.lastName}}
Original Appointment Time: {{2.prevDateTime}}
Search Events (Google Bundle): 
{{`17`}}

Based on the list of upcoming events returned from Google Calendar, please:

1. Identify if the client's name matches.
2. Previous appointment time matches.

If the client has a previous appointment time that is booked, ONLY return the value of the eventId WITHOUT the eventId key.
If the client doesn't have a previous appointment time that is booked, only return: BOOKING_NOTFOUND

Return either only the eventId VALUE, or BOOKING_NOTFOUND

contents.text:
Dear {{2.firstName}},

This is to confirm that your Zoom meeting has been successfully rescheduled.

Rescheduled Meeting Details:
Previous Date: {{formatDate(2.prevDateTime; "YYYY/MM/DD")}}
Previous Time: {{formatDate(2.prevDateTime; "h:mm A")}}


New Date: {{formatDate(2.newDateTime; "YYYY/MM/DD")}}
New Time: {{formatDate(2.newDateTime; "h:mm A")}}

If you wish to speak or have any other queries, feel free to contact me directly at 9173 3883.

Best regards,
Daniel Wong JiaJin
jjwongdaniel@ippfa.com

messages.content:
You are an expert at analysing data bundles from Google APIs. You will be assessing to see if the client's provided first and last name, and previous appointment time is present from the bundle.

Client Name: {{2.firstName}} {{2.lastName}}
Original Appointment Time: {{2.prevDateTime}}
Search Events (Google Bundle): 
{{`29`}}

Based on the list of upcoming events returned from Google Calendar, please:

1. Identify if any event matches this client's name and original appointment time.
2. Confirm the details of the matched event (summary, time, etc.), if found.

If the client has a previous appointment time that is booked, ONLY return the value of the eventId WITHOUT the eventId key.
If the client doesn't have a previous appointment time that is booked, only return: BOOKING_NOTFOUND

Return either only the eventId VALUE, or BOOKING_NOTFOUND

contents.text:
Dear {{2.firstName}},

This is to confirm that your Zoom meeting has been successfully cancelled.

Cancelled Meeting Details:
Date: {{formatDate(2.prevDateTime; "YYYY/MM/DD")}}
Time: {{formatDate(2.prevDateTime; "h:mm A")}}

If you have any questions or need to make further changes, feel free to contact me at 9173 3883.

Best regards,
Daniel Wong JiaJin
jjwongdaniel@ippfa.com
